docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON AUG-16-2016 : ( FEE FOR SERVICE $ 140.00 ) AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-11-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRIAN WOLFE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THOMAS CARTY. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2016; JUDGMENT DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BRIAN WOLFE, ONLY. CIVIL BENCH WARRANT TO ISSUE NOTWITHSTANDING THE RETURN OF THE BENCH LETTER ISSUED 7/7/16. MR. WOLFE GUARANTEED THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY'S CORRECT & CURRENT ADDRESS IS 3132 24TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED SERVED BY SHERIFF NOTICE MAILED TO THOMAS CARTY ON 10/25/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-22-2016 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 350.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $2,380.00, --- CASH BAIL --- AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
REMARK: RECEIVED LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF RE CHANGE OF ADDRESS. ADDRESS UPDATED THIS DATE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WOLFE, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SIGNED AND SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER WITH ONE (1) COPY FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT
ORDER CONTINUED TO JANUARY 23, 2017 FOR CONTINUED OEX. BENCH LETTER ISSUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **FEE FOR SERVICE:150.00** SERVED FEB-14-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
MAILING OF BENCH LETTER TO DEFENDANT THOMAS CARTY RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-08-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY CREDITOR BRIAN WOLFE & DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY. PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. THE COURT INSTRUCTS DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY TO BRING WITH HIM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE A COPY OF HIS 2015 STATE & FEDERAL INCOME TAX FILINGS, AND A COMPLETED STATEMENT OF ASSETS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER RECALLING CIVIL BENCH WARRANT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BRIAN WOLFE. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO THOMAS CARTY ON 12/08/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED."

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2017; JUDGMENT DEBTOR THOMAS CARTY FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. CASH BAIL SET AT $2,380.00. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLFE, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/10/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $125.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOLFE, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CARTY, THOMAS DBA CARTY MOVING & STORAGE
